# DataPingo

> DataPingo builds productivity apps for Confluence teams on the Atlassian Marketplace. Our tools automate bulk operations, content management, and reporting — helping teams save hours of manual work.

DataPingo specializes in Atlassian Forge apps that integrate natively with Confluence Cloud. Products are trusted by teams for project template management, client onboarding automation, sprint documentation, and cross-space reporting.

## Products

- [Bulk Page Cloner for Confluence](https://datapingo.com/products/bulk-page-cloner/): Clone individual pages or entire page hierarchies in Confluence with a single click. Supports template reuse across projects, spaces, and teams.
- [Bulk Report Generator for Confluence](https://datapingo.com/products/bulk-report-generator/): Automatically generate reports across multiple Confluence spaces and pages. Export and share documentation insights at scale.

## Company

- [About Us](https://datapingo.com/company/about-us): DataPingo's mission, background, and team.
- [Contact](https://datapingo.com/company/contact): Reach the DataPingo team for support, partnerships, or inquiries.
- [Careers](https://datapingo.com/company/careers): Open roles and culture at DataPingo.

- [Documentation](https://datapingo.com/resources/documentation/): Getting started guides, feature documentation, and how-to articles for all DataPingo products.
- [Blog](https://datapingo.com/resources/blog): Product updates, tips, and insights for Confluence teams.
- [Use Cases](https://datapingo.com/resources/use-cases): Real-world scenarios showing how teams use DataPingo to automate Confluence workflows.

## Partners

- [Become a Partner](https://datapingo.com/partners/become-a-partner): Join the DataPingo partner program to resell, refer, or integrate our apps.
- [Find a Partner](https://datapingo.com/partners/find-a-partner): Browse certified DataPingo partners for implementation and support.
